title: ilex rotunda
intro: Ilex rotunda, also known as the American holly, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and astringent effects. The health benefits of Ilex rotunda include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and provide relief from respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, or infusions, which are used to treat various ailments, making it a valuable addition to natural remedies.
